name: admin-console-e2e-integration
description: Real-BFF-plus-web-dev-server integration E2E suite (Playwright), driving a live login/preview/apply flow against a fake-engine stub. Distinct from tests/e2e/, which is F-001's mocked-API smoke suite against a production preview build. Owned by tests/e2e-integration/ only -- see specs/ and TEST_PLAN.md for the spec-level test matrix; this package covers cross-component user journeys, not every unit/spec-level edge case.
